title: My Profile
description: View and update your personal information

fieldDescriptions.profileImageUrl: URL of your profile photo (upload coming soon)
fieldDescriptions.adminOnly: Contact your institute admin to change this field

fieldHelp.bloodGroupBody: Recorded for medical emergencies only. If you are hurt on campus or during a field trip, the school nurse, first responders, and the hospital need to know this immediately — donor matching saves critical minutes. Left blank if not medically verified.
fieldHelp.motherTongueBody: The language most commonly spoken at home. UDISE+ collects this for multilingual-education planning under the National Education Policy 2020. It is also used to decide which language the institute should use for important parent communications like fee reminders and emergency alerts.
fieldHelp.nationalityBody: Required for UDISE+ demographics and for issuing Transfer Certificates that will be accepted by foreign institutions. Most Indian institutes default to Indian, but boarding schools and international-curriculum schools need the correct value for visa and passport-related paperwork.

personalSection.title: Personal details
personalSection.description: Your personal information as recorded by the institute

editableSection.title: Editable details
editableSection.description: Update your contact phone and profile photo. Name and date of birth are read-only — ask your institute admin to change them.

errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number

guardianSection.title: Linked children
guardianSection.description: Students linked to you as a parent or legal guardian

draft.title: Draft available
draft.description: We saved your previous edits. Restore them or discard.
